original_image_tags: A small, solid black circle, approximately the size of a pea, is stamped or drawn on the left side of the page, approximately two-thirds of the way down, to the left of the signature block. The document is a typewritten report on aged, light-gray paper. There is a horizontal dashed line across the lower portion of the page, just above the signature block. The page number "139" is handwritten in the top right corner.

elements.description: A typed document titled 'Unidentified Flying Object' detailing a sighting report from 9 July 1948 near Osborn, Ohio. The document contains four numbered paragraphs describing the object's appearance, movement, and the observer's background. It is signed 'CLARENCE GLAZEBROOK, 1st Lt., USAF' and includes typist initials and location details. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, and there is no visual content to contradict.
